What's Inside

Run your truck like a business.

Every tool an owner-operator needs to make smarter decisions and keep more of what they earn.

Load Calculator

Estimated net earnings per load with fuel, deadhead, tolls, and operating costs factored in.

Premium

Live Load Map

Browse 123Loadboard loads on an interactive map with real rate-per-mile color coding.

Free

Insights Dashboard

Weekly earnings, gross vs net, profit per load. Know exactly where your money goes.

Premium

Bank Sync via Plaid

Connect your bank to auto-pull real expenses into your net pay calculations.

Premium

Live Fuel Prices

Real-time diesel at nearby stations, automatically factored into every calculation.

Free

Route Weather

Driving condition warnings for your route before you hit the road.

Free
